description_long: This wine glass features a faceted, geometric bowl with a deep ruby red upper section and a clear lower section, creating a striking two-tone appearance. The bowl transitions into a slender, faceted stem that connects to a wide, polygonal base, providing stability. The upper red portion of the bowl is opaque or semi-opaque, while the lower clear section is highly transparent, allowing light to refract through its angular surfaces. The rim of the glass is relatively thin and even, contributing to an elegant drinking experience. The overall design is modern and decorative, with sharp, crystalline facets throughout. This glass would be suitable for serving wine in upscale urban settings such as restaurants, bars, or special events.
description: A modern wine glass with a faceted, ruby red upper bowl and a clear, angular lower section, connected by a slender stem and wide base. The design is elegant and geometric, with a striking two-tone appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the deep red upper bowl and clear, faceted lower section with the stem and wide base fully visible.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view highlighting the transition between the red and clear sections and the angular facets of the bowl.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizing the geometric pattern and the clear distinction between the colored and transparent parts.
description_view_3: Rear view with the red upper bowl and clear lower section, showing the symmetry and faceted design of the glass.
attribute_bowl_curvature: The bowl has a faceted, angular curvature with abrupt transitions between flat surfaces, rather than a smooth, rounded contour. The upper section is straight-sided with sharp geometric edges.
